title: Web Platform
description: A full-stack web application built with Next.js and TypeScript, featuring real-time data updates and responsive design.

title: AI Toolkit
description: Machine learning pipeline for data analysis and prediction, built with Python and TensorFlow.

title: Mobile App
description: Cross-platform mobile application built with React Native and Expo, supporting iOS and Android.

title: API Service
description: RESTful API service with Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL, featuring comprehensive documentation.

title: Design System
description: Component library and design system for consistent UI across multiple web applications.

title: CLI Tool
description: Command-line tool for automating development workflows and project scaffolding.
